name: store quality event record number
output: Store the value 'QE-000178' in memory with the key 'QE-######'.

name: store investigation record number
output: Store the value 'INV-000014' in memory with the key 'INV-######'.

name: store root cause record number
output: Store the value 'RC-000036' in memory with the key 'RC-######'.

name: store capa record number
output: Store the value 'CAPA-000008' in memory with the key 'CAPA-#####'.

name: store effectiveness check record number
output: Store the value 'EFF-000008' in memory with the key 'EFF-######'.

name: store effectiveness check duration
output: Store the value '2' in memory with the key 'Duration of Eff Check'.

name: navigate qms vault
output: Navigate to '<<vault_url>>'.

name: login qms external user
output: Login to '<<qmsVault>>' using '<<qmsExternal>>' credentials.

name: open capa actions module
output: Navigate to the CAPA Actions module from Quality Actions.

name: search capa record
output: Fetch the CAPA record number from memory and search the record.

name: edit actions taken field
output: Enter '<<immediateActions>>' in the Actions Taken rich text editor.

name: select action executed to plan
output: Select 'Yes' for Action Executed to Plan.

name: enter exceptions to plan
output: Enter '<<qmsRationale>>' in the Exceptions to Plan field.

name: verify actions taken populated
output: Verify that the Actions Taken field is populated.

name: complete capa task
output: Complete the CAPA workflow task with verdict 'Complete'.

name: esign capa completion
output: Complete electronic signature using '<<qmsExternal>>' credentials.

name: verify capa hidden after approval
output: Verify External Collaborator can no longer access the CAPA Actions record.

name: login qms qa user
output: Login to '<<qmsVault>>' using '<<qmsQa>>' credentials.

name: verify capa in approval
output: Verify CAPA Action record state is 'In Approval'.

name: approve capa action
output: Approve the CAPA Action workflow.

name: select capa approval outcome
output: Select '<<qmsPlan>>' from the Approval Outcome dropdown.

name: verify capa closed
output: Verify CAPA Action record state is 'Closed'.

name: store capa closed date
output: Fetch and store the CAPA closed date in memory as 'CAPA-Closed Date'.

name: search effectiveness check
output: Fetch the Effectiveness Check record number from memory and search the record.

name: verify effectiveness check pending due date
output: Verify Effectiveness Check record state is 'Pending Due Date'.

name: verify monitoring end date calculation

input.label: Monitoring End Date
input.formula: CAPA-Closed Date + Duration of Eff Check

output: Verify Monitoring End Date equals CAPA Closed Date plus Duration of Effectiveness Check.

name: start effectiveness check workflow
output: Start the Effectiveness Check workflow.

name: login qms ec user
output: Login to '<<qmsVault>>' using '<<qmsEc>>' credentials.

name: select effectiveness outcome
output: Select '<<qmsEffective>>' from the Outcome dropdown.

name: enter effectiveness result
output: Enter '<<qmsRationale>>' in the Result rich text editor.

name: verify effectiveness check in approval
output: Verify Effectiveness Check record state is 'In Approval'.

name: reject effectiveness check
output: Reject the Effectiveness Check workflow.

name: verify effectiveness check in progress
output: Verify Effectiveness Check record state is 'Effectiveness Check In Progress'.

name: approve effectiveness check
output: Approve the Effectiveness Check workflow.

name: verify effectiveness check closed
output: Verify Effectiveness Check record state is 'Closed'.
